name: Sulu's Lemon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the thinly sliced onion in a large bowl.
2. Cut the ends off the lemon and slice it; add to the onion.
3. Add sugar, sake (or white wine), and soy sauce; stir well.
4. Rinse and pat dry the chicken breasts.
5. Place the chicken breasts in the bowl with the marinade and spoon over them.
6. Marinate for an hour at room temperature, stirring occasionally to ensure all pieces are equally marinated.
7. In a dish or small mixing bowl, thoroughly beat the egg.
8. Put flour in a plastic bag.
9. Dip a couple of chicken breasts in the beaten egg and then coat with flour from the bag.
10. Heat oil in a pan.
11. Add the coated chicken breasts to the hot oil one at a time until all pieces are coated.
12. Brown the chicken on both sides over medium heat (about 20-30 minutes).
13. Add the marinade and simmer until the chicken is well cooked, about another 30 minutes.
